tasks.label: Welcome
tasks.command:
echo '
=== 2001: A Quarto Odyssey ===
Environment ready. R, Quarto and LaTeX available in the terminal.

The course is in course/course.qmd. To open it in the browser:
  quarto preview course/course.qmd

The first exercise (Zotero) is done on your local machine.
The second exercise (Quarto + R) starts in:
  exercises/02-quarto-analysis/template/manuscript.qmd
'
